Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer

Class OutputStreamSerializer

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.marshall.Context
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingContextable
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingTraverseContext
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.Serializer
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.OutputStreamSerializer
Direct Known Subclasses:
BsonSerializer, CborSerializer, ImageSerializer, MsgPackSerializer, ParquetSerializer, RdfStreamSerializer
public class OutputStreamSerializer extends Serializer
Subclass of Serializer for byte-based serializers.
Notes:
  • This class is thread safe and reusable.
See Also:
  • Serializers and Parsers

  • Method Details

    • create

      public static OutputStreamSerializer.Builder<?> create()
      Creates a new builder for this object.
      Returns:
      A new builder.

    • createSession

      public OutputStreamSerializerSession.Builder<?> createSession()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Create a session builder based on the properties defined on this context.

      Use this method for creating sessions where you want to override basic settings. Otherwise, use Context.getSession() directly.

      Overrides:
      createSession in class Serializer
      Returns:
      A new session builder.

    • getSession

      public OutputStreamSerializerSession getSession()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Returns a session to use for this context.

      Note that subclasses may opt to return a reusable non-modifiable session.

      Overrides:
      getSession in class Serializer
      Returns:
      A new session object.

    • isWriterSerializer

      public final boolean isWriterSerializer()
      Description copied from class: Serializer
      Returns true if this serializer subclasses from WriterSerializer.
      Overrides:
      isWriterSerializer in class Serializer
      Returns:
      true if this serializer subclasses from WriterSerializer.

    • serialize

      public final byte[] serialize(Object o) throws SerializeException
      Convenience method for serializing an object to a byte.
      Overrides:
      serialize in class Serializer
      Parameters:
      o - The object to serialize.
      Returns:
      The output serialized to a byte array.
      Throws:
      SerializeException - If a problem occurred trying to convert the output.

    • getBinaryFormat

      protected final BinaryFormat getBinaryFormat()
      Binary output format.

      Resolves from the configured MarshallingContext.getBinaryFormat().

      Returns:
      The binary wire format used by this serializer.
